about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: I’m a Software Engineer passionate about building solutions that make a real impact. My journey started in web development, where I worked extensively with React.js to create responsive, user-focused applications, but I have gradually shifted my focus toward backend development and process automation.
about.experience: At the same time, I continue to develop my skills in the Java ecosystem, especially in Spring Boot, as well as other topics such as microservices, cloud providers, and software architecture.
about.final-subtitle: I’m excited about the endless possibilities that technology offers, and I’m always eager to take on new and exciting projects.
